name: com.suwol.suwol2d
description: Unity runtime and importer for Suwol 2D Animator assets.

samples.description: Sample JSON and textures for the Suwol 2D Runtime MVP.
Sample JSON and textures for a rigid mesh attachment character.
Sample JSON and textures for a weighted mesh attachment character.
Sample JSON and textures for mesh deform timeline playback.
Sample JSON and textures for two-bone IK constraint playback.
Sample JSON and textures for multiple skins and slot attachment swaps.
Sample .suwol2d importer asset, debug JSON, and textures for generated prefab workflow.
Sample .suwol2d importer asset, debug JSON, and textures for attachment, draw order, slot color, and event timelines.
Sample .suwol2d importer asset, debug JSON, textures, and state machine data for single-layer crossfade playback.
Sample .suwol2d importer asset, debug JSON, textures, explicit durations, and representative timeline key data.
Sample .suwol2d importer asset, debug JSON, textures, and interpolation preset data.
Sample .suwol2d importer asset, debug JSON, textures, and convex clipping attachment data.
Sample .suwol2d importer asset, debug JSON, textures, and transform constraint data for weapon follow playback.
